description: CompositionWhite round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with a ribbed neck, half sleeves and graphic print on the frontFittingComfortWash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees Use mild detergent Do not dry clean Do not wring Do not bleach Do not scrub Dry flat in shade Cool iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Wash, dry and iron inside out Celebrate the beauty of saxophone jazz with this grey cotton t-shirt from united colors of benetton. It's the music that crosses barriers to unite the world. So join in this beauty of life with this cotton tee, and stay fresh all day. Team it with jeans and sports shoes or shorts and casual footwear for that varied look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
